zh.lifeSummary: Abigail於1226年出生在英國爾斯托普特。她於1259年與William de Thornton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1269年在英國巴金哈姆爾桑頓享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Abigail于1226年出生在英国爾斯托普特。她于1259年与William de Thornton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1269年在英国巴金哈姆爾桑頓享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Abigail was born in 1226, in Stockport, Cheshire, England. She married William de Thornton in 1259. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1269, in Thornton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Abigail est née en 1226, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William de Thornton en 1259. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1269, à Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Abigail wurde 1226 in Stockport, Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1259 William de Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1269 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Thornton, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Abigail è nata il nel 1226 nel Stockport, Cheshire, England. Lei sposato William de Thornton nel 1259. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1269, nel Thornton, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Abigailは1226年にイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで生まれた。1259年にWilliam de Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1269年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアソルントンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail(은)는 1226년 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1259년 William de Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1269년 영국 벅잉함실르 토른턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Abigail nasceu em 1226, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William de Thornton em 1259. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1269, em Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Abigail родилась в 1226 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Thornton в 1259 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1269 г. в местности таурнтон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Abigail nació en 1226, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con William de Thornton en 1259. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1269, en Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
